case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. BUTTERFIELD CONSTRUCTION CO., INC., et al

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD CONSTRUCTION CO., INC., ADBA BUTTERFIELD CONCRETE CONSTRUCTION BUTTERFIELD JR, DANNY BUTTERFIELD, DARREN
DECLARATION OF LAUDEL VILLANUEVA RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD CONSTRUCTION CO., INC., ADBA BUTTERFIELD CONCRETE CONSTRUCTION BUTTERFIELD JR, DANNY BUTTERFIELD, DARREN POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: -SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $65.76, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $4,997.72 DAMAGES, $825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $300.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,123.02, THE $65.76 REPRESENTS INTEREST; THE FAIR MARKET VALUE IS $2,200.00. THE LEASED EQUIPMENT IS ONE TOPCON GTS 229 TOTAL STATION W/BATTERY, CHARGER & MANUAL - SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
